notes: Gated ('manual'): requires accepted license + HF token to download. Raw config.json is auth-walled; layers/hidden verified via byte-equivalent ungated mirrors (unsloth/ and NousResearch/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, both 32/4096). Plain text-only causal LM, long-supported model_type, no issues on transformers 5.9.0.

Canonical id is gemma-4-E4B-it (lowercase 'e4b' 307-redirects to it). Multimodal any-to-any model: top-level config has no layers/hidden; values are from text_config (model_type gemma4_text). Total safetensors 8.0B but 'E4B' = ~4B effective active params (per-layer embeddings). Load with Gemma4ForConditionalGeneration (not a bare CausalLM); text-only prompting works but the class pulls in vision/audio towers. Config written with transformers 5.5.0.dev0, so fine on 5.9.0. lastModified 2026-06-03.

model_type is phi3 (natively supported), but repo carries a 'custom_code' tag — loads fine without trust_remote_code via the built-in Phi3 class; the custom code is auxiliary. 3.836B params matches the plan's 3.8B.

MoE: 32 local experts. Weights ship MXFP4-quantized (repo tags '8-bit','mxfp4'); on non-Hopper GPUs transformers dequantizes to bf16 on load (~40GB+ RAM) unless mxfp4 kernels (triton>=3.4 + kernels pkg) are installed. Standard AutoModelForCausalLM otherwise; supported since transformers 4.55, fine on 5.9.0. Uses harmony chat format via its chat template.

Canonical capitalization is 'Olmo-3-7B-Instruct' ('OLMo-3-...' redirects to it). Plain text causal LM, model_type olmo3 supported since transformers 4.57, fine on 5.9.0. This is the Instruct (SFT+DPO+RL) variant as requested; Olmo-3-7B-Think also exists if a reasoning variant is wanted.

No '-Instruct' suffix exists in this family: 'Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B' IS the post-trained instruct model (base is Qwen/Qwen3.5-9B-Base). Entire Qwen3.5 line is multimodal (pipeline image-text-to-text); layers/hidden taken from text_config (model_type qwen3_5_text). 9.65B total safetensors includes the vision tower. Load with Qwen3_5ForConditionalGeneration; released 2026-03-02, so verify qwen3_5 support landed in the installed transformers 5.9.0 (config was written pre-5.x on a 4.57.0.dev0 fork).

The literal plan name deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-8B does NOT exist (API 404; the original R1 distill line had Qwen-1.5B/7B/14B/32B and Llama-8B, never Qwen-8B). The plan's own flagged alternative deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-R1-0528-Qwen3-8B is confirmed: R1-0528 chain-of-thought distilled onto Qwen3-8B-Base. It is a reasoning model — outputs <think> blocks by default, which affects instruct-style probing. Standard qwen3 causal LM, fine on transformers 5.9.0.

API reports gated: false, but license is Mistral Research License ('license:other') — research-only terms. Repo's library_name is now 'vllm' (Mistral rebranded repos toward vllm/mistral-common), yet config.json with MistralForCausalLM and tokenizer_config are present, so transformers 5.9.0 loads it as a standard mistral text model. Uses interleaved sliding-window attention (128k context).
